settings.text: Diagnostics and treatment plans tailored to species, age, and lifestyle.

settings.title: What we provide
settings.description: Not sure where to start? Call triage and we will route you to the right department.

settings.title: Preventive & wellness
settings.description: Vaccination schedules, parasite prevention, senior panels, and nutrition consults with body-condition scoring.

settings.title: Dental & oral surgery
settings.description: Full-mouth radiographs, extractions, and oronasal fistula repair with multimodal pain control.

settings.title: Soft-tissue & orthopedic surgery
settings.description: Spay/neuter to TPLO and fracture repair; board-certified surgeons on call for complex cases.

settings.title: Internal medicine
settings.description: Endocrine disease, GI workups, immune-mediated conditions, and chronic pain pathways.

settings.title: Urgent & emergency
settings.description: Triage, oxygen, blood products, and overnight hospitalization with continuous monitoring.

settings.title: Exotics & pocket pets
settings.description: Rabbits, guinea pigs, reptiles, and birds by appointment with dedicated handling protocols.

settings.title: Why we radiograph every tooth
settings.description: Hidden disease lives below the gumline—visual exams alone miss most pathology.

settings.question: Do I need a referral?
settings.answer: Primary care is open to all new patients. Specialist referrals can come from your current vet or from our doctors after exam.

settings.question: What if I cannot pay upfront?
settings.answer: We accept CareCredit and Scratch Pay; estimates are provided before non-emergency procedures.

settings.question: Do you see wildlife?
settings.answer: We coordinate with licensed rehabilitators for injured wildlife; call before bringing animals to the lobby.

settings.title: Prescription refills
settings.text: Use the portal or text REFILL to (555) 428-9102. Allow 24 hours.
